vllm.title: Remove AsyncLLMEngine busy loop, shield background task
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR reduces CPU utilisation of AsyncLLMEngine by replacing busy looping with an asyncio.Event triggered whenever there are new requests, and makes sure that the background loop task is shielded from cancellation.

vllm.title: Fix hanging when prompt exceeds limit
vllm.author: chenxu2048
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I discovered that my API server with AsyncLLMEngine was blocked when a lengthy prompt was submitted to it. This problem shares similarities with issues #765 and #1026.
The scheduler is adding seq_groups that are larger than the prompt_limit:
if num_prompt_tokens > self.prompt_limit:
    logger.warni

vllm.title: [FIX] Don't initialize parameter by default
vllm.author: zhuohan123
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Without this fix, many models cannot run. For example, gpt2 will initialize the parameters for vocab and the following assert will immediately fail.
